SEO.title: Our story · Zomaar Zomert
SEO.description: Who we are, how Zomaar Zomert started, and why for almost thirty years we've been filling the field in Itterbeek with music and good company on the last weekend of July.

openGraph.title: Our story · Zomaar Zomert
openGraph.description: Almost thirty years of Zomaar Zomert. A short trip through who we are and how we got here.

hero.title: Our story.
hero.intro: We're Zomaar Zomert. A small crew from Itterbeek that's been filling the field with music, beers and good company every last weekend of July for almost thirty years. Here's how it all started.
